raw.message: 【自由気ままにコレクション】大迫力のポケモンカードをコレクション！

hook.summary: Simultaneous opening of two digital Pokémon card packs.
hook.visual_action: Two smartphones side-by-side show the animation of swiping to open Pokémon card packs with text highlighting free daily packs.
hook.text_overlay: 1日2パック無料の開封をすれば
hook.voiceover_transcript: 1日2パック無料の開封をすれば

scene_flow: Opening digital card packs on dual smartphone screens with text highlighting free daily packs.
Montage of individuals smiling and reacting to cards appearing on their phone screens.
Scenes of a couple and a family bonding over the game.
Final call-to-action screen with the game logo and download links.
on_screen_text: 毎日2パック無料で開封！
audience_proxy: Casual Pokémon fans and mobile gamers looking for a low-commitment daily digital hobby.
